title: Xixi personal dev system evidence evolution
objective: Use local xixinikl-owned projects as evidence sources to improve xixi-dev-system and xixi-agent-profile, including reusable CDS-style Goal authoring, automated learning promotion, verification, and GitHub publication.

tasks.title: Audit local repository ownership and project evidence
tasks.acceptance: The inventory contains the five local working copies (four unique origins) whose origin belongs to xixinikl, and both gongtu-project working copies plus canvas-storm have traceable evidence indexes without reading remote repository content.

tasks.title: Classify project lessons and promotion candidates
tasks.acceptance: Every candidate records source evidence, repeated pattern, proposed scope, enforcement mode, limitation or counterexample, and verification.

tasks.title: Implement system learning and CDS Goal automation
tasks.acceptance: xixi-dev-system can discover owner-scoped local projects, produce evidence-backed learning candidates, and validate the required CDS Goal structure without modifying source projects.

tasks.title: Promote reusable rules and templates into the Profile
tasks.acceptance: xixi-agent-profile exposes the promoted rules, CDS Goal template, boundaries, and maintenance path through its normal start and workflow indexes.

tasks.title: Verify the complete learning promotion flow
tasks.acceptance: Automated tests and temporary-directory exercises pass; read-only exercises against both source projects prove owner scoping, evidence traceability, and no source-project mutation.

tasks.title: Publish both system repositories and complete the audit
tasks.acceptance: xixi-dev-system and xixi-agent-profile each have an intentional verified commit pushed to GitHub, and the completion audit maps every explicit requirement to direct evidence.
